penalties.description: No FLS task performance visible - video shows only product demonstration of laparoscopic instruments without any suturing, knot tying, or Penrose drain work.

reasoning: This video contains only promotional material and product demonstration of laparoscopic instruments by Incision Instrument company. No FLS task 4 elements are present - no suture material, no Penrose drain, no marked targets, no knot pusher usage for actual suturing, and no laparoscopic trainer setup. The video shows instrument handling demonstrations but no actual task performance that can be scored according to FLS rubric.
